SQLLoaderMapping.name: Eco regions
SQLLoaderMapping.fetch_sql:
SELECT name AS EcoBoundaryName
            FROM eco_boundary e
            INNER JOIN eco_boundary_tr e_tr
                ON e.id = e_tr.eco_boundary_id
            INNER JOIN locale
                ON e_tr.locale_id = locale.id
            WHERE locale.code = 'en-CA'
